title: Dhoom 3
tmdbOverview: To avenge his father's death, a circus entertainer trained in magic and acrobatics robs banks to take down a corrupt bank owner. Two cops from Mumbai are assigned to the case.
synopsis: Dhoom 3 (2013) is a action and crime film from India. It has a 5.4 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a 12 certification (DE rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
